methods.method_name: Patient Symptom and Drug Data Collection
methods.description: Process for collecting daily ocular, nasal, and asthmatic symptom data, as well as drug use data, from study participants using a standardized diary throughout the ragweed season.

steps.description: From July 16, 2014 to September 15, 2014, all patients lled in a daily Clinical Diary of Symptoms and Drugs (CDSD).
steps.searchable_summary: Collect daily patient symptom and drug data using a clinical diary over a specified period.
inputs: Clinical Diary of Symptoms and Drugs (CDSD)
outputs: Daily completed CDSD records for each participant during the study period

methods.description: Process for measuring daily airborne concentrations of ragweed and mugwort pollen in the study area using multiple pollen traps throughout the ragweed season.

steps.description: During the same period [July 16 - September 15, 2014], pollen counts were measured from three pollen traps located in the study area.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure daily airborne pollen counts from multiple traps in a specific area over a specified period.
outputs: Daily pollen counts (ragweed, mugwort) from each of the three traps during the study period

methods.description: Process for aggregating daily patient symptom/drug scores and daily pollen counts into daily means/averages for use in subsequent statistical calculations comparing pollen exposure and symptoms across study cohorts.

steps.description: The daily averages of ragweed and mugwort pollen concentration obtained from the three pollen traps were used for statistical calculations...
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate daily average ragweed and mugwort pollen concentration from measurements obtained from multiple traps.
inputs: Daily ragweed and mugwort pollen counts from three traps

steps.description: ...against the daily mean of the symptom/drug scores for each of the two sub-cohorts.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate daily mean symptom/drug scores for each of the two study sub-cohorts (non-AIT and AIT treated).
inputs: Daily completed CDSD records for participants in the non-AIT cohort
Daily completed CDSD records for participants in the AIT treated cohort
outputs: Daily mean symptom/drug score for the non-AIT cohort
Daily mean symptom/drug score for the AIT treated cohort
